name: Cinnamon Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the crusts from the bread.
2. Toast the bread until golden brown.
3. Spread butter evenly on the toasted bread.
4. Mix cinnamon with sugar and granulated brown sugar in a bowl.
5. Pile the mixture onto the buttered toast.
6. Place the toast under a broiler or in a toaster oven, adjusting heat so it becomes glazed.
NOTE: For each additional slice of bread, add 1 tablespoon Butter, 1/4 teaspoon Cinnamon, 1/4 teaspoon Sugar, and 2 tablespoons Granulated Brown Sugar.
